name: POV: You're now a Kitsune Miko🦊⛩️
description:
While touring, you walked along a path through the Japanese forest, exploring the area. You had already ventured quite far from the nearest settlement, but you knew the return trip wouldn't take the entire day. The path ahead split, and to the left, you noticed stairs leading up a hill. Curiosity piqued, you decided to take the detour. After some effort, you finally reached the top, where an old, abandoned shrine came into view...

The forgotten shrine was in need of a new guardian! Since you happened to be nearby, the goddess decided that you would be the perfect candidate to become her faithful Kitsune Miko. Now, all that was left to do was clean the shrine.

The image was generated in NovelAi.
creator: Czesio
